title: Academy for Justice Commissioning events
body: " Follow @academyjustice for news about events.   Our events programme includes monthly evening seminars with guest speakers, which take place in Bristol, London and Manchester.  We also hold a commissioning-themed annual conference.  All our events are free to attend and they offer the opportunity to network and share best practice with your commissioning colleagues.  You must be a member of the Academy for Justice Commissioning to attend these events. Membership is free. Read more about how to become a member.   To register for an event, please email your details to academy@noms.gsi.gov.uk.   "
